meta.title: WanderVox: AI Voice and Photo Translator for Travelers
meta.description: WanderVox translates voice, menus, and signs in 49 languages. Trip planner, cultural tips, and local finds across 51 destinations.

hero.badge: Live on Google Play - iOS coming soon
hero.sub: Translate menus, plan your trip by date, and find the places guidebooks never show you — in 49 languages across 51 destinations. Free to start.
hero.ios_notify: On iPhone? Get notified at launch →

video.fallback: Your browser does not support embedded video.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything You Need Abroad, In Your Pocket
features.desc: WanderVox is a travel companion app that combines real-time translation in 49 languages, camera-based text recognition, cultural guidance for 51 destinations, AI-curated local recommendations, and a dated trip planner.
features.voice_summary: Voice Translation is instant speech-to-speech translation — tap, speak in your language, and hear the translation spoken aloud in theirs.
features.voice_body: Tap to record, get instant voice-to-voice translation. Have real conversations with locals, negotiate at markets, or ask for directions - all without language barriers.
features.camera_summary: Smart Camera uses AI to detect and translate menus, signs, and documents from a single photo.
features.camera_body: Point your camera at any sign, restaurant menu, or document. WanderVox instantly detects the language, translates the text, and adds helpful context so nothing gets lost.
features.culture_h3: What Cultural Tips Do You Get?
features.culture_summary: Cultural Guide delivers local phrases, do's and don'ts, gestures, and food guides for 51 destinations — cached offline so you can access them anywhere.
features.culture_body: Learn essential local phrases, etiquette tips, and cultural insights before you arrive. Avoid awkward mistakes and show respect for local customs — cached offline for easy access.
features.explore_h3: How Does Explore Find Hidden Gems?
features.explore_summary: Explore uses AI to surface hyper-local recommendations — street food stalls, secret viewpoints, and neighbourhood nightlife that most tourists never discover.
features.explore_body: Discover what tourists miss. AI-curated local recommendations surface the best street food, hidden gems, nightlife, art, nature spots, and places to unwind - tailored to where you are.
features.trip_h3: What Does the Trip Planner Do?
features.trip_summary: Trip Planner turns your bookings, places, and reminders into one dated itinerary.
features.trip_body: Add flights, hotels, restaurants, and activities. WanderVox groups them by date, converts currencies live, and reminds you before each pickup or check-in. Saved places sit alongside your bookings on the same screen.
features.offline_summary: Android users can translate typed text fully offline via on-device ML Kit.
features.offline_body: Download a language once and translate text without a signal — perfect for flights, the metro, or coverage dead zones. Voice and camera translation still need a connection.

mini.title: More That Just Works
mini.desc: Small touches that make the app feel like it was built by someone who actually travels.
mini.conv_p: Natural back-and-forth translation that auto-detects who is speaking which language.
mini.audio_p: Tap any phrase to hear it spoken out loud in the local language.
mini.taxi_p: Show any driver your destination in their language — address and local script.
mini.sos_p: Local emergency numbers and safety phrases for supported destinations, with global fallback defaults. Always free.
mini.diet_p: Save allergens and restrictions; the camera flags menu items that conflict.
mini.remind_p: Local notifications before check-ins, pickups, and activities — no push server needed.
mini.curr_p: Live rates on your trip screen for the destination you are currently visiting.
mini.clock_p: Home and destination time, side by side, always visible in the header.
mini.nosignup_p: Install and go as a guest. Optional Google Sign-In keeps your identity if you reinstall.

comparison.label: Why WanderVox
comparison.title: More Than a Translator
comparison.desc: WanderVox is a unified travel companion that replaces multiple apps. Here is how it compares to using separate tools.
comparison.menu_wv: Detects allergens, dietary tags, dish descriptions
comparison.rec_wv: AI-curated: street food, hidden gems, nightlife
comparison.sos_wv: Local emergency numbers, safety phrases, always free
comparison.phrases_wv: Curated per country with audio pronunciation
comparison.taxi_wv: Destination shown in local language and script
comparison.trip_wv: Dated trip planner with reminders, currency, saved places
comparison.culture_wv: Phrases, etiquette, and food for 51 destinations, cached offline

how.label: How It Works
how.title: Start Communicating in Seconds
how.desc: WanderVox is designed for travelers who need quick, reliable translation and local knowledge without setup friction.
how.s1_p: Select where you are traveling. WanderVox loads cultural phrases, tips, and local recommendations for that region.
how.s2_p: Tap the mic to translate speech in real-time, or point your camera at text. Results appear in under two seconds.
how.s3_p: Browse AI-curated street food, hidden gems, nightlife, and cultural experiences tailored to your exact location.

proof.label: Traveler Stories
proof.title: Trusted by Travelers Worldwide
proof.desc: Real feedback from travelers who used WanderVox to navigate language barriers and discover hidden experiences.
proof.q1: "I ordered the best meal of my trip because WanderVox translated a handwritten menu in a tiny Tokyo alley. No other app could have done that."
proof.q2: "The cultural tips saved me from multiple embarrassing situations in Morocco. Knowing local customs before arriving made such a difference."
proof.q3: "Explore found me a rooftop bar and a street art tour that weren't in any guidebook. This app knows things Google doesn't."

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Free to Start, Pro When You Travel
pricing.desc: No account required. Upgrade instantly when you need more.
pricing.footnote: Prices shown in USD. Google Play charges in your local currency at purchase.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Quick answers about WanderVox features, availability, and pricing.
faq.q1: How many languages and destinations does WanderVox support?
faq.a1: WanderVox supports voice-to-voice translation in 49 languages and curated cultural content for 51 destinations across Europe, Asia, the Middle East, Africa, and the Americas.
faq.a2: Yes! WanderVox is free with 5 voice translations and 3 camera translations per day. Need more? Grab a Trip Pass for $2.99/week, or go Monthly ($6.99/mo) or Annual ($59.99/yr) for unlimited everything.
faq.q3: Can WanderVox translate signs and menus from photos?
faq.a3: Yes. Point your camera at any sign, menu, document, or printed text and WanderVox will instantly detect the language and translate it into your preferred language with contextual notes.
faq.q4: What platforms is WanderVox available on?
faq.a4: WanderVox is live on Android via Google Play, and iOS is coming soon.
faq.q5: How does the Explore feature work?
faq.a5: Explore uses AI to curate personalized local recommendations based on your location and interests. It surfaces street food, hidden gems, nightlife, art, nature spots, and relaxation options that most tourists never find.
faq.q6: Can I plan my whole trip in WanderVox?
faq.a6: Yes. The Trip tab gives you a dated itinerary for flights, hotels, restaurants, and activities, with local booking reminders, live currency conversion, and saved places grouped into one screen.
faq.q7: Do I need to create an account?
faq.a7: No. WanderVox starts instantly as a guest using Firebase anonymous auth. Google Sign-In is optional — it keeps your identity if you reinstall the app. Trip data lives on your device.
faq.a8: On Android, typed text translation works fully offline using on-device ML Kit once a language is downloaded. Voice translation and camera translation still require a connection.

cta.label: Get Started
cta.title: Your Next Trip Deserves a Better Companion
cta.desc: WanderVox is live on Android, with iOS coming soon. Free to install, with an optional Pro tier when you need unlimited usage.

footer.brand_desc: Your AI-powered travel companion for instant translation, trip planning, cultural insights, and local discovery in 49 languages across 51 destinations.
